capabilities.justification: Loads the Erlang/OTP runtime shared library via extern "C" declarations to call the erl_nif C API.
Calls erl_nif C API functions (enif_make_int, enif_get_tuple, etc.) through FFI.

justification: FFI bridge to Erlang/OTP BEAM runtime. Loads the erts shared library and calls erl_nif C API functions through raw extern "C" declarations.
